# Implement Family-Specific AI Features

## Description
Add AI capabilities specifically designed for family management, including child activity suggestions, meal planning integration, and family-specific scheduling logic.

## Type
- **Type:** New Feature
- **Priority:** High
- **Component:** AI Agent, Family Dashboard
- **Milestone:** AI Agent v2.0

## Use Case
The AI can suggest "Pizza night every Friday" based on family preferences, or recommend "Soccer practice at 4pm" based on the child's age and interests.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Child activity suggestions based on age and interests
- [ ] Meal planning integration with calendar
- [ ] Family-specific scheduling logic (school hours, bedtime)
- [ ] Chore assignment and tracking
- [ ] Family member preference learning
- [ ] Age-appropriate activity recommendations
- [ ] Family calendar optimization
- [ ] Integration with existing family features

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Add family member profile analysis
- [ ] Implement age-based activity suggestions
- [ ] Create meal planning AI tools
- [ ] Add chore management integration
- [ ] Implement family-specific scheduling rules
- [ ] Add family preference learning
- [ ] Create family activity recommendation engine

## Implementation Notes
- Consider child safety and age-appropriate content
- Integrate with existing family dashboard features
- Add parental controls and approval workflows
- Consider family privacy and data protection
- Implement family-specific natural language processing
